recommendations: Update review-scope prompt paths from cursor-packs/ to cursor-impl-cycle/ for this repo layout.
Land MOD-DRSAM-DESIGN-SYSTEM before feature pages during decompose.

critiques.finding: MOD-DRSAM-API lists only 12 of 24 api_event roots; remaining events may be orphaned during implement.
critiques.alternative: Add remaining api_event ids from ir/inventory.json to MOD-DRSAM-API ir_roots or split into MOD-DRSAM-API-IN and MOD-DRSAM-API-OUT.

critiques.finding: Shell module references all five authenticated page roots; decompose may duplicate shell work per page.
critiques.alternative: Keep shell as single module but decompose one shared layout item before page-specific items.
